title: Man had ten nights of chilling visions showing the deadly crash of Flight 191 that killed 273
summary_full: In May 1979, American Airlines Flight 191 crashed near Chicago, killing 273. Days before, David Booth reported experiencing ten consecutive nights of vivid visions foretelling the disaster. Though he contacted the FAA, authorities lacked actionable details. The visions eerily mirrored the crash, leaving Booth and witnesses haunted. Flight 191’s tragedy remains entwined with unsettling folklore and aviation superstition.
